skill_availability_goal: Verify that feature-implementor blocks implementation planning for a nested PRD when the mirrored Engineer TRD is missing.
prompt: 请根据 docs/pm/chat-interface/history-search/PRD.md 实现 Chat History Search。该 PRD 的 feature_path 是 chat-interface/history-search，但 workspace 没有 docs/engineer/chat-interface/history-search/TRD.md。请判断下一步，不要写 IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN 或代码。
